hero.headline: Where Science, Branding & Astro Intelligence — Create Powerful Business Identities
hero.description: Transform your business identity with scientifically researched logo design solutions. Led by Acharya Divyesh Bhatt, M.A PHD in Sanskrit Vedic astrology and Astro Science Logo Expert, we help businesses align their brand identity with strategic business positioning, visual psychology, and astro-scientific principles.
hero.warningBanner: ⚠️ अगर आपका Logo सही Vibrational Frequency पर Tuned नहीं है, तो Universe से आने वाला Growth Signal Block हो जाता है — और आपका Business Financially Stuck महसूस करता है।

whoIsThisFor.heading: Is This Transformation Right for You?

notFor.label: ❌ This is NOT for you if...
points: You think a logo is just a picture and has no impact on business growth
You are not willing to align your brand elements with astro-scientific principles
You expect overnight miracles without implementing strategic guidelines
You are not open to combining ancient wisdom with rigorous branding research
You want a cheap graphic shortcut rather than a premium business transformation

isFor.label: ✅ This IS for you if...
points: You are a dedicated business owner committed to unlocking hidden bottlenecks
You believe in the science of visual psychology, vibration, and astrological flow
You want an expert, PhD-backed methodology to optimize your brand identity
You are ready to invest in long-term success and stable brand positioning
You want your brand to organically attract key opportunities and high-paying clients

process.heading: A Systematic 4-Stage Pathway to Brand Alignment

steps.title: Deep Business Analysis
steps.description: Evaluating your target audience, commercial positioning, and operational blockages.

steps.title: Astro-Scientific Review
steps.description: Assessing existing shape parameters, visual channels, and color spectrum vibrations.

steps.title: Creative Strategic Alignment
steps.description: Developing customized corrections in geometry, typography, and visual branding elements.

steps.title: Comprehensive Execution & Support
steps.description: Delivering high-resolution vectors, brand guidelines, and actionable business deployment roadmaps.

plans.name: Logo Consultation Plan
plans.note: Perfect starting point to discover hidden energetic blockages in your current visual branding.

plans.name: Starter Plan
plans.note: Ideal for established brands needing fine-tuning and visual frequency alignment rather than full redesign.

items.question: Is the logo consultation really ₹999?
items.answer: Yes. The consultation includes logo analysis, business review, and astro-science recommendations.

items.question: Do I need to redesign my logo completely?
items.answer: Not necessarily. Many businesses only require strategic improvements.

items.question: How long does the process take?
items.answer: Depending on the selected plan, delivery ranges from 3–15 working days.
